name: merx-mcp
description: The complete TRON infrastructure layer for AI agents. Aggregates all energy and bandwidth providers, routes orders to cheapest source. Resource-aware transactions, SunSwap DEX swaps, x402 pay-per-use, standing orders, delegation monitors.

MERX_API_KEY.description: API key from merx.exchange (optional for read-only tools)

TRON_PRIVATE_KEY.description: TRON private key for signing transactions (optional)
